direction.audience_fit: Consulting, academic, executive, classroom, print-friendly review.

typography.heading: Aptos, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.body: Aptos, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.mono: SF Mono, Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace

patterns.title_slide: Large left-aligned title, restrained accent field, short subtitle.
patterns.section_slide: Centered vertical rhythm with eyebrow, title, and short framing text.
patterns.comparison_slide: Two equal bordered panels with semantic top accents.
patterns.table_slide: Thin dividers, muted grid, no heavy fills.
patterns.code_slide: Dark code block on light slide with short caption.
patterns.architecture_slide: Simple flow, few nodes, labels large enough for projection.

decisions.decision: Use a clean light theme as the default professional deck style.
decisions.rationale: It works for executives, classrooms, printed decks, and source-heavy review.
